creator: elbarto@arcadebsd.org
text:
Dmitry Marakasov wrote:
> * elbarto (elbarto@arcadebsd.org) wrote:
> 
>>> Good. May I suggest using more verbose knobs? s|V|VIDEO|, s|S|SOUND|,
>>> s|I|INPUT| would be better.
> 
> What about these? I mean in OPTIONS.
> 
>>> Also it does not respect CC/CXX/CFLAGS/CXXFLAGS and LOCALBASE (and maybe
>>> PREFIX).
>>>
>>> Finally note that it's ONLY_FOR_ARCHS, not ARCH, and it also needs
>>> USE_XORG+=x11.
>> Attached shar correct all of the above.
>> Sorry for the delay.
> 

Updated shar attached (and with an update to 0.48).

-- 
Emmanuel Vadot
elbarto@arcadebsd.org
